title: DriveWealth Account
description: A DriveWealth brokerage account representing an investor's trading account, including identification, status, balances, and associated metadata.

accountNo.description: Human-readable account number assigned at account opening.

accountStatus.description: Current lifecycle status of the account.

nickname.description: Partner-assigned display name for the account.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the account base currency.

userID.description: Identifier of the user who owns this account.

riaID.description: Registered Investment Advisor identifier linked to this account, if applicable.

riaProductID.description: RIA product associated with this account.

goodFaithViolations.description: Number of good faith violations on the account.

patternDayTrades.description: Number of pattern day trades in the rolling 5-day window.

tradingType.description: Trading eligibility type for the account.

openedWhen.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the account was opened.

closedWhen.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the account was closed, null if still open.

updatedWhen.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last account update.
